text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No! I'm not gonna dance! Why don't you just
dance by yourself?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I brought her to the dance studio because I
figured she could use some extra dance lessons,
but... this is how it's been going.
choice_data_list: There's no point if you don't dance...
There's no point if you don't dance...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Like I care! I'm busy gathering magical energy
over here!

Oh, then wouldn't dancing be perfect?! I gather
energy through dancing, myself!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Let's dance to "Princess ☆ Party"! It's
the ending theme of the third season of Princess
Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It's easier to just see for yourself! Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
HIIIYAAAH!
Ha, ho, hyah!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
The heck?! There's so much energy coming off
you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess dances vigorously until there's
steam rising off of her. It looks just like magical
energy!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Phew... What do you think? Could you see my
amazing princess energy? ☆

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I saw it! Show me how to do it right away! I'm
gonna store so much energy! You'll see!
choice_data_list: (Hey, this might be good dance practice!)
(Hey, this might be good dance practice!)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yes! ♪ Throw it off with all your might! ♪ It's the
fighting princess way! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Everyone, gather around the tiara! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep and Kawakami
text_block_list.text: Energetic princess! ♪ Ho!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I feel kinda warm and fuzzy! Could this be...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! You're full of energy! Your face has
changed as well!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Well, it was exciting! Do you know any more cool
dances like this? Please show me!
choice_data_list: Sure you don't need a break?

There's a dance that'll give you even more
energy.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's right! Times like this call for...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oregano Recovery! I'll just drink some of this
magic water and blow my fatigue away!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Recharge complete! Now I can dance at extra full
power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess Sweep Tosho is enjoying herself,
considering she keeps dancing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You know one?! Nice going, Familiar! What kind
of dance is it?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Concerts are huge masses of energy! It sounds
like we can expect to power up even more!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I like the sound of that!
Familiar! Hurry up and play the music!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho works hard at her dance practice
until it gets quite late!
